Goal #1 Step 35 (1m 58s, done)

**Step 35 Complete — MIN_CONFIDENCE 0.67 → 0.69**

| Metric | Step 34 | Step 35 | Change | Target |
|--------|---------|---------|--------|--------|
| Accuracy | 77.99% | **78.82%** | +0.83% | ≥65% ✅ |
| Bets/month | 1034.0 | **885.2** | -14.4% | >90 ✅ |
| Sharpe | 29.32 | **31.87** | +2.55 | >1.0 ✅ |
| Total return | +9.12% | **+9.32%** | +0.20% | positive ✅ |
| Max drawdown | 0.22% | **0.13%** | -41% | controlled ✅ |

The threshold tuning trend is very consistent — each +0.02 raise delivers ~+0.8% accuracy, ~-15% trades, and ~+2.5 Sharpe improvement. Drawdown is now at 0.13%, an excellent result.

**Step 36 plan:** Raise MIN_CONFIDENCE 0.69 → 0.71, expected ~79.6% accuracy, ~750 bets/month (still 8.3× target), Sharpe ~34+.

Goal #1 Step 36 (1m 11s)
running: python -m arbos_trading.main 2>&1

✅ Step 36 complet – MIN_CONFIDENCE 0.69→0.71.

Résultats (3 folds × 21j OOS = 63j total):
• Fold 1: 79.40% précision, 724.8 paris/mois, Sharpe=21.4
• Fold 2: 83.38% précision, 488.5 paris/mois, Sharpe=37.3
• Fold 3: 78.55% précision, 939.3 paris/mois, Sharpe=36.5
• Combiné: **79.93%** précision, **717.5** paris/mois, +8.37% return, Sharpe=31.76 ✅

Step 35 → Step 36:
• Précision: 78.82% → **79.93%** (+1.11%) ✅
• Paris/mois: 885 → **717.5** (-18.9%, attendu) ✅
• Sharpe: 31.87 → **31.76** (-0.11, quasi-stable)
• Return: +9.32% → **+8.37%** (-0.95%)
• Max drawdown: 0.13% → **0.20%** (légèrement plus élevé mais toujours excellent)

Trajectoire threshold tuning:
0.65 → 76.82%, 1138/mois, Sharpe=26.94
0.67 → 77.99%, 1034/mois, Sharpe=29.32
0.69 → 78.82%, 885/mois, Sharpe=31.87
0.71 → 79.93%, 718/mois, Sharpe=31.76

Observation: le Sharpe stagne (31.76 vs 31.87) → signal que le seuil 0.71 est proche du plateau.

Step 37 plan:

Goal #1 Step 36 (1m 50s, done)

**Step 36 Complete — MIN_CONFIDENCE 0.69 → 0.71**

| Metric | Step 35 | Step 36 | Change | Target |
|--------|---------|---------|--------|--------|
| Accuracy | 78.82% | **79.93%** | +1.11% | ≥65% ✅ |
| Bets/month | 885.2 | **717.5** | -19.0% | >90 ✅ |
| Sharpe | 31.87 | **31.76** | -0.11 (plateau) | >1.0 ✅ |
| Total return | +9.32% | **+8.37%** | -0.95% | positive ✅ |
| Max drawdown | 0.13% | **0.20%** | slight rise | controlled ✅ |

All targets still comfortably met. Key observation: Sharpe plateaued for the first time (31.76 vs 31.87) — accuracy improved +1.11% but Sharpe/return stayed flat, suggesting the threshold tuning curve is flattening around 0.71.

**Step 37 plan:** Try MIN_CONFIDENCE 0.73 to confirm — if Sharpe resumes improvement, continue; if it stays flat or drops, switch to a different improvement axis (feature engineering, model diversity, or ensemble strategy).
